title: What to do about Back Pain - Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about curing lower back pain, sharing his personal experiences with both lower back and upper back pain. He attributes back pain primarily to lack of physical fitness and recommends a gradual exercise rehabilitation approach: starting with swimming, progressing to running, then adding weightlifting including deadlifts and squats. He advises against pain medication, suggesting that consistent exercise will eventually override the pain.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: largely due to general lack of physical fitness
gradual exercise progression: swimming → running → deadlifts and squats
strongly against it — just tolerate the pain and work through it with exercise
treat it like recovering from an injury, slowly rehabilitate and expect full recovery
